title: Bashkim Smakaj Rule 68(2) Request for Remote Attendance, together with 1 Annex

Bashkim Smakaj Rule 68(2) Request for Remote Attendance, together with 1 Annex
Specialist Prosecutor’s Office Specialist Counsel for Hashim Thaçi
Kimberly P. West Sophie Menegon
Luka Mišetić
Specialist Counsel for Bashkim Smakaj
Jonathan Elystan Rees KC

KSC-BC-2023-12/F00842/2 of 5 PUBLIC
02/04/2026 15:22:00
I. INTRODUCTION
1. The Defence for Mr. Bashkim Smakaj (‘Defence’) hereby respectfully requests
the Single Trial Judge (‘STJ’) to authorise Mr. Smakaj to attend the presentation
of Defence evidence remotely via video-conference pursuant to Rule 68(2) of
the Rules and the STJ’s order1.
II. APPLICABLE LAW
2. Pursuant to Rule 68(1) of the Rules of Procedure and Evidence, the Accused has
the right to be tried in his presence.
3. Pursuant to Rule 68(2), after an Accused attended the initial appearance
hearing, he may attend subsequent proceedings via video-conference upon
authorisation by the Panel, provided that Specialist Counsel attends the
hearing in person.
1 KSC-BC-2023-12, F00642, Decision on the Conduct of the Proceedings, 22 December 2025, public, para. 43
KSC-BC-2023-12 1 02/04/2026

KSC-BC-2023-12/F00842/3 of 5 PUBLIC
02/04/2026 15:22:00
III. PROCEDURAL HISTORY
4. On 1st April 2026, a Defence Preparation Conference was held. During that
hearing an application made pursuant to Rule 68(2) was granted in favour of
Mr Fazliu, and the STJ indicated he would be favourably inclined towards
requests towards such requests from any of the other accused 2.
IV. SUBMISSIONS
5. On 27th March 2026, the Defence filed a notice pursuant to Rule 119 of the Rules
of Procedure and Evidence, to confirm that no defence case would be called.3
6. Mr Smakaj`s physical presence is not necessary for his full participation in the
trial. Mr Smakaj will be represented by Specialist Counsel and has had
conferences with Specialist Counsel, his further instructions can be taken via
video conferencing, and he can be informed of any matters upon which further
instructions are required.
7. Mr Smakaj has provided his waiver for his right to be physically present in
court4.
2 KSC-BC-2023-12, Transcript of hearing on 1st April 2026, pp. 14
3 KSC-BC-2023-12, F00828_Bashkim Smakaj Defence Notice Pursuant to Rule 119(1)
4 Annex 1
KSC-BC-2023-12 2 02/04/2026

KSC-BC-2023-12/F00842/4 of 5 PUBLIC
02/04/2026 15:22:00
8. The Accused has deep family and community ties to Pristina. The Accused is
married, with a permanent address and two young children. The Accused has
complied with all the conditions of his release. 5
V. CONCLUSION
9. The Defence respectfully requests that the STJ authorises Mr. Smakaj`s remote
attendance for the evidentiary proceedings of the Defence Case.
VI. CLASSIFICATION
10.This filing is classified as public.
Word count: 503 words
JONATHAN ELYSTAN REES KC
Specialist Counsel for Mr Smakaj
5 KSC-BC-2023-12, F00719, Seventh Decision on Review of Detention of Fadil Fazliu, 3 February 2026,
